g.text: No matrices are built on failure.
copy method: crane copy by digest (A1)
from needs context. Exits 1 if either
Fail: mirror job(s) did not succeed
Each job fans out over N images (fail-fast: false)
- dhi.io (DHI registry - source for primary tier)
- gcr.io (Google Container Registry - source for distroless tier)
- sigstore (Cosign keyless signing / attestation, main only)
